text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I let victory fall through my fingers last time, but
things won't turn out like that today!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I've further trained these princess muscles, and
now they're my ticket to a crushing win!
choice_data_list: Go and show them what you're made of!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I will! So keep your eyes locked on this princess's
gallant figure!
